force_60hz_v1.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz_v1.notes: 7th series engine (6th, 7th, 7th 1.5, 7th 2.0, CV). Uses call [ebp+0x54]. Replaces mov ebx,[edi+0x18] with push 0x3c; pop ebx (3-byte trick to set ebx=60).
force_60hz_v1.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

force_60hz_v2.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz_v2.notes: BE engine (3rd, 4th, 5th, BE, BE-A, EC). Uses large negative EBP stack offsets. Replaces mov ecx,[eax+0x18]; push ecx(refreshRate) with push 0x3c(60); nop; nop.
force_60hz_v2.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

force_60hz_v3.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz_v3.notes: EZ2AC engine (EV, NT, TT, FN, FN_EX). Replaces mov edx,[edi+0x18]; push ebx(flags=0); push edx(refreshRate) with push ebx(0); push 0x3c(60); nop; nop.
force_60hz_v3.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

force_60hz.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz.notes: 1st only — unique scan pattern with absolute memory address loads.
force_60hz.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

force_60hz.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz.notes: 1st SE only — uses DirectDrawCreate (not DirectDrawCreateEx). refreshRate is hardcoded push 0, changed to push 0x3c.
force_60hz.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

force_60hz.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz.notes: 2nd only — same structure as BE engine but uses small EBP stack offsets [ebp-N] instead of large negative offsets.
force_60hz.description: Forces DirectDraw SetDisplayMode to request 60Hz. Scans for the call site pattern so it works across versions.

use_io_card_force.name: Force UseIOCard Enabled
use_io_card_force.description: Patches all UseIOCard checks to always proceed as if UseIOCard=1, regardless of INI value.
